#Rule NameStatusSourceDestination
1Allow-AllOnLANWAN
ZoneType
LANLAN
WANWAN
SettingValue
IPsec VPNEnabled
SSL VPNEnabled
Remote AccessDisabled
InterfaceRange StartRange EndLease Time
Port110.0.0.10010.0.0.2008h
Port2192.168.1.100192.168.1.20024h
Primary DNS: 8.8.8.8 Secondary DNS: 8.8.4.4 DNS Proxy: Enabled Conditional Forwarding: corp.local → 10.0.0.5
